productDisplayName: CASIO Baby-G Women Blue Analogue & Digital Watch BX005
description: Case style: Analogue and digital watch with a stainless steel circular case Dial style: Blue dial, has abstract display of hour marks, circular digital display near the eight-hour mark, and branding at the twelve-hour mark Features: Alarm, stopwatch, countdown timer, world time, backlight LED, and buttons to reset the time Strap style: Blue, shock-resistant, resin strap secured with a tang clasp Water resistance up to 100 mComes in a signature CASIO case Warranty: 2 years against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
